title: Velvety Light Moroccan Butter Stir-fry
description: A buttery and velvety Moroccan dish featuring smoked paprika and deglazed with Mediterranean-friendly flavors.
instructions: Season chicken with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Add onions and garlic to the pan, sautéing for another minute or two until fragrant.
Stir in tomato paste, smoked paprika, cumin seeds, oregano, and lemon juice. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes to let flavors meld together.
Pour in butter, reduce heat to medium-low, and allow the mixture to bubble and thicken slightly.
Reduce heat to low and add cooked chicken back into the skillet. Gently stir until fully combined and heated through.
Serve hot with a side of crusty bread or as a main course on its own.
